requests.name: Register - Create user
requests.tests: pm.test('Status is 201', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(201); }); pm.test('Has success message', function(){ const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.message).to.eql('User created successfully'); });

requests.name: Login - Sign in
requests.tests: pm.test('Status is 200', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); pm.test('Response contains token', function(){ const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('token'); });
